name: CHTC Helon Co., Ltd.
summary: CHTC Helon Co., Ltd. produces and sells viscose fiber products in China, Southeast Asia, Europe, the Middle East, South America, and internationally. The company offers phase change viscose fibers; Chinese health regenerated cellulose fibers; no dyed fibers; new modal fibers under the Newdal name; Ace Ventura Lun, a protein fiber wool; purcell hemp fiber under the Jutecell name; and An Fu tournament fiber under the Anti-fcell name. It also provides TCF, hollow, alginate, and health fibers. The company was formerly known as Shandong Helon Co., Ltd and changed its name to CHTC Helon Co., Ltd. in September 2013. The company is based in Weifang, China. CHTC Helon Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Hengtian Fiber Group Co., Ltd.
